description_long: This object is a stylized potted plant featuring two large, broad green leaves with prominent white veins and a smaller leaf lower on the stem. The leaves are angular and geometric, giving the plant a low-poly, artistic appearance. The stem is long, slender, and slightly bent, supporting the leaves at different heights. There is no visible pot or container at the base, and the plant appears to be free-standing. The coloration is primarily a vibrant green with lighter vein patterns, and the surface has a matte, slightly rough finish. The overall form is minimalistic, making it suitable for decorative use in urban parks, sidewalks, or modern indoor spaces.
description: A stylized, low-poly potted plant with two large green leaves featuring white veins and a slender, angular stem. The plant has a minimalistic, geometric design and a matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing both large leaves and the smaller lower leaf, with the main stem visible and the leaf veins clearly displayed.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the angular bend of the stem and the overlapping of the two main leaves, with the smaller leaf partially obscured.
description_view_2: Rear view emphasizing the back surfaces of the leaves and the straight alignment of the stem, with less detail visible in the leaf veins.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the main leaves from a different angle, with the stem's angularity and the smaller leaf more visible.
attribute_plant_species: Alocasia (Elephant Ear) or similar broad-leaf tropical plant
